title: BEUI2 Runtime Network Evidence Baseline
objective: Provide a reproducible public baseline for observing, documenting and exporting network/runtime evidence from the Icare BEUI2 educational lab.
recommendedPractices: Declare the scenario and its security scope
Separate naive behavior from hardened behavior
Capture runtime events without exposing secrets
Generate a deterministic example pack for CI
Avoid pretending to provide official Doctrine certification from the public lab

doctrineBoundary.platformResponsibility: Ingest, score, compare, package, seal, sign and govern evidence packs.
